name: Tandoori Chicken (Indian Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the skin off the chicken pieces and make several cuts into each piece.
2. Wash the chicken clean with paper towels.
3. Mix vegetable oil, red food color, black pepper, garlic powder (1-2 teaspoons), onion (if desired), salt, and garam masala in a bowl to create a marinade.
4. Marinate the chicken pieces in the mixture for at least 4 hours, or overnight for best results.
5. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Place the marinated chicken in the preheated oven and bake for 30 minutes, basting occasionally with the yogurt juices.
7. If there is excess juice in the pan, spoon some out before broiling.
8. Broil the chicken for an additional 2 to 5 minutes until lightly browned.
9. Sprinkle with garam masala and garnish with lemon slices and a few leaves of cilantro (optional).
